setup_positioning.text: 3 fascia layers: superficial investing (platysma/EJV), pretracheal (continuous with carotid sheath, superior/inf thyroid vessels), prevertebral (thick, lines prevert muscles, sympa
Landmarks: angle of mandible ~C2-3, carotid tubercle C6.
Risks: RLN (~2.3%, right more variable/vulnerable); sympathetic chain on longus colli lateral at C6 (Horner if injured); carotid sheath; retropharyngeal hematoma.

structures_at_risk.structure: Risks: RLN (~2.3%, right more variable/vulnerable); sympathetic chain on longus colli late
structures_at_risk.why_at_risk: Identified in source library as at-risk structure for this approach.
structures_at_risk.how_to_avoid_injury: Maintain direct visualization and controlled retraction.
